challenge.explanation: Half plus a quarter equals three quarters. Think: 2/4 + 1/4 = 3/4
Third plus sixth equals half. Think: 2/6 + 1/6 = 3/6 = 1/2
Two thirds plus sixth equals five sixths. Think: 4/6 + 1/6 = 5/6
Quarter plus eighth equals three eighths. Think: 2/8 + 1/8 = 3/8
Two fifths plus tenth equals half. Think: 4/10 + 1/10 = 5/10 = 1/2
